module.name: executor
module.purpose: Executor folder module for host-side tool execution. executor.rs defines Executor, which owns active ExecutionRuntime records in a WorkQueue keyed by ExeId and exposes preview, evoke, query, cancel, kill, and updates surfaces. The execution child module owns the per-execution runtime: ExecutionRuntime (the host-side remote runtime of an agent Execution holding an Arc<ExecutionContext>, its execution SessionEvent channel endpoints, and an optional worker join handle) and ExecutionContext (which mirrors the agent-side TaskContext with the ExecutionSignature and the shared agent SessionEvent sender). mod.rs is re-export wiring only; method bodies are panic-backed interface placeholders.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Per-execution host runtime split out of executor.rs: ExecutionRuntime drives one agent Execution over its SessionEvent channel, and ExecutionContext holds the shared ExecutionSignature and agent SessionEvent sender.
